pageContext.name: Big Daddy - Rosie
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Gaming Heads are proud to present the Big Daddy - Rosie Statue from the best-selling video game franchise Bioshock.  Standing in front of a Little Sister, Rosie is depicted in 1:4 scale and stands about 21 inches tall. Shielding the Little Sister from any attack, Rosie is depicted with its basic heavy diving suit and holding its signature rivet gun.  Always seen with its Little Sister, the Rosie is one the of five Big Daddies from the BioShock series. They are built to protect Little Sisters while they are collecting ADAM. The strong bond between a Rosie and its Little Sister makes the Rosie highly aggressive. Attacking a Little Sister will definitely trigger the wrath of her Big Daddy protector.  Each statue has been cast in polystone resin so that it shows the finest of details and is hand-painted. Each statue comes in deluxe full-color packaging, has a hand-numbered base and a certificate of authenticity.
